name: crypto-contract-dashboard-v2
business_goal: Turn a discretionary low-leverage crypto futures framework into a repeatable decision dashboard using public market data.
trigger: User opens the dashboard to scan market regime, candidate setups, sector rotation, and risk sizing before placing trades.

steps.name: Render candidate tables, rotation view, and risk metrics
Store user trade journal entries locally

failure_and_retry_rules: If one API fails, show degraded dashboard state instead of blank page.
Use cached browser data for journal and adjustable settings.
Keep the app read-only with respect to exchanges; no trade execution.
